zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Edward Burnell於1371年出生在英國諾福爾可瑟尼時，他的父親Hugh Burnell24歲，母親Philippa De La Pole11歲。他於1396年之前與Alianore le Strange在英國格盧斯特斯爾唐 阿普尼結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1415年登記服兵役。他去世於1415年9月23日在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利哈福勒爾享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Edward Burnell于1371年出生在英国諾福爾可瑟尼时，他的父亲Hugh Burnell24岁，母亲Philippa De La Pole11岁。他于1396年之前与Alianore le Strange在英国格盧斯特斯爾唐 阿普尼结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1415年登记服兵役。他去世于1415年9月23日在法国豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利哈福勒爾享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: Burnell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Burnel, a metathesized form of Old French Brunel, originally a nickname for someone with brown hair or complexion.

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Edward Burnell was born in 1371, in Thurning, Norfolk, England, his father, Hugh Burnell, was 24 and his mother, Philippa De La Pole, was 11. He married Alianore le Strange before 1396, in Down Ampney, Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He registered for military service in 1415. He died on 23 September 1415, in Harfleur, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Edward Burnell est né en 1371, à Thurning, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Hugh Burnell, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Philippa De La Pole, avait 11 ans. Il a épousé Alianore le Strange avant 1396, à Down Ampney, Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1415. Il est décédé le 23 septembre 1415, à Harfleur, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Edward Burnell 1371 in Thurning, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh Burnell 24 und seine Mutter Philippa De La Pole 11. Er hat vor 1396 in Down Ampney, Gloucestershire, England Alianore le Strange geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er hat sich 1415 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 23. September 1415 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Harfleur, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edward Burnell è nato il nel 1371 nel Thurning, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Hugh Burnell, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Philippa De La Pole, aveva 11 anni. Lui sposato Alianore le Strange prima del 1396, nel Down Ampney, Gloucestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1415. Morì il 23 settembre 1415, nel Harfleur, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Edward Burnellが1371年にイギリスノーフォルクスウルニングで生まれた時，父Hugh Burnellは24歳，母Philippa De La Poleは11歳であった。1396年以前にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアダウン アンプニーでAlianore le Strangeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1415年に兵役登録をした。彼は1415年9月23日にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメハーフレウルで44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Edward Burnell(이)가 1371년 영국 노르폴크 스른잉에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh Burnell(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Philippa De La Pole(은)는 11세였다. 그는 1396년 이전 영국 그루스스터실르 다운 아p니에서 Alianore le Strange(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1415년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1415년 9월 23일 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 하르플레우르에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edward Burnell nasceu em 1371, em Thurning, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh Burnell, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Philippa De La Pole, tinha 11 anos. Ele casou-se com Alianore le Strange antes 1396, em Down Ampney, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1415. Ele faleceu em 23 de setembro de 1415, em Harfleur, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, França, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Edward Burnell родился в 1371 г. в местности турнинг, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Hugh Burnell было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Philippa De La Pole, 11. Он женился на женщине по имени Alianore le Strange перед 1396 г. в местности доун ампни, глоусестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. В 1415 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 23 сентября 1415 г. в местности харфлеур, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция в возрасте 44 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Edward Burnell nació en 1371, en Thurning, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh Burnell, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Philippa De La Pole, tenía 11 años. Se casó con Alianore le Strange antes de 1396, en Down Ampney, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1415. Murió el 23 de septiembre de 1415, en Harfleur, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 44 años.
